items.name: Gravzero Official Web
items.desc: The primary landing zone for the Gravzero ecosystem, featuring high-end UI/UX and dynamic branding.

items.desc: Dedicated platform for the GravZero Taekwondo academy, scheduling, and martial arts curriculum.

items.desc: Marketing platform for Infinity Taekwondo, driving enrollment and showcasing athlete programs.

items.name: Infinity TKD Student Portal (SMS)
items.desc: Internal student management system mapping progression, height, weight, and belt rankings.

items.desc: Comprehensive administrative dashboard for managing student lifecycles, payments, and grading.

items.desc: High-end action design video, mapping explosive tricking sequences in Phnom Penh.

items.name: SEA Games Highlights
items.desc: Directorial edit of the Cambodian Taekwondo Federation's performance.
